content.rendered: Our firm specializes in protecting our client’s intellectual property, which includes confidential and proprietary information, copyrights, trademarks, and trade secrets. Copyrights generally protect music, movies, photographs, and other original works of authorship. Trademarks protect logos and unique names that create goodwill and identity.

}">

To protect intellectual property, we will prepare a confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement for our clients to safeguard against third party disclosure. It is also important to register copyrights, trademarks, and patents to put third parties on notice and to recoup attorney’s fees and costs if litigation ensues.   

The following is a list of the services that we offer:

  • Misappropriation of Trade Secrets
  • Copyright Infringement
  • Trademark Infringement
  • Non-Disclosure and Solicitation Agreements
  • Confidentiality Agreements
  • Licensing Agreements
  • Assignment Agreements

excerpt.rendered: Our firm specializes in protecting our client’s intellectual property, which includes confidential and proprietary information, copyrights, trademarks, and trade secrets. Copyrights generally protect music, movies, photographs, and other original works of authorship. Trademarks protect logos and unique names that create goodwill and identity.  To protect intellectual property, we will prepare a confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement for our clients to safeguard against third party disclosure.
